turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Enquiring About a Rental Property or Housing Inspection

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hello. I’m calling about an apartment.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi there! Absolutely, thanks for calling. I can definitely help you with that. Let me just check — are you calling about a one-bedroom property near Central Station?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. That one.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, I know exactly which one you’re referring to. That’s a popular listing, so it’s good you called early. Are you mainly looking for the inspection details today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. When can I see it?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question. We have an inspection scheduled for this Saturday, and it runs from 10am until am. So you don’t need to arrive exactly at 10 — anytime within that window is fine.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 10 to … okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Exactly. Some people like to come early, some come closer to the end — both are completely fine. Just one important thing before I forget: you’ll need to register online before attending.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Register… email only?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, just your name and email address. No full account, no documents at this stage — very quick and simple.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. That’s fine.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. Now, just so I give you the most helpful information — are you currently renting in Australia, or would this be your first rental here?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I rent now. But short time.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s completely fine — a lot of people are in the same situation. Short rental history is very common, especially for students and people who’ve recently moved.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Let me also run through a few key details people usually ask about before inspections. First, the apartment is unfurnished, so you would need your own bed and furniture.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No bed?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s right — no bed or sofa. However, the kitchen appliances are included, so you’ll have a fridge, oven, and cooktop.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Fridge included. Good.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that definitely makes things easier. Now, in terms of noise, because it’s close to Central Station, there can be some train noise during the day.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: At night also?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Mostly during the day and early evening. Late at night it’s generally much quieter, but it’s good to be aware of.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: There’s no dedicated parking space with the apartment, just so you know. But there is street parking available nearby.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I don’t have car.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect — that makes parking a non-issue then. Now, the rent for the property is $510 per week, and the bond is four weeks’ rent.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Four weeks… so bond is… wait.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That comes to $2,040 in total for the bond.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. Correct.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great. If you like the property after the inspection, you can apply straight away online. Applications are usually reviewed within two to three business days.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If many people apply… still chance?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, definitely. What helps most is having your documents ready — things like photo ID, proof of income, and any rental history you have.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Rental history… I have only short one.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s okay — you can still apply. The agent will look at the full application, not just one factor.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: So just to quickly summarise everything for you: inspection is this Saturday from 10 to am, please register online beforehand with your name and email, and if you like the place, you can apply online afterward.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Saturday. Register first. Then decide.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Exactly right. If you think of any other questions before Saturday, feel free to give us a call.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Thank you.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! Good luck with the inspection — we’ll see you on Saturday.
